message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  MessageAlign left
  ArrowThickness 2
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontSize 28
  ParticipantFontSize 26
}

actor User as U

participant "云平台(网关)" as GW
participant "云平台(统计服)" as STAT

== 监控预警查询 ==

U -> GW : 1 监控预警次数
GW -> STAT : 2 监控预警次数
STAT --> GW : 3 返回次数
GW --> U : 4 (数据库=>五类预警)日/月数量

@enduml
